rootCauseHypothesis:
TEST FAILURE

The Patient Portal page does not provide a patient search-by-name feature; only the patient login form is available so it is not possible to search for a patient by name.

Observations:
- The page shows only the login form with 'ID DOCUMENT NUMBER' and password fields.
- No patient search input or labels like 'Nome', 'Pesquisar', 'Buscar', or a visible patient search/results area were found.
- The module displays Register and demo instructions, but no patient details, contact info, or medical history sections are present on this page.
